rationale: The authoritative metric dictionary establishes that bot-adjusted retention, not raw retention, controls the decision. The authoritative quality audit reports 8% bot-adjusted 30-day retention and an eligible sample size of 720. Although the eligible sample exceeds the 500 minimum, retention is below the required 10%, so S-9 does not qualify for release. The dashboard note corroborates that the displayed 12% raw value should not drive release.
uncertainty: No material remaining uncertainty in the supplied controlling metrics; the reported bot-adjusted retention definitively fails the release threshold.
